name: Cranberry Punch
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the cranberries, removing stems and soft berries.
2. Cook according to package instructions until berries are soft.
3. Chop berries in a blender or put through a food mill.
4. Add 2 cups water.
5. Strain through cheesecloth or several thicknesses of nylon net.
6. Add orange juice concentrate and sweetener (if using).
7. Dilute with enough water to make 8 cups.
Serving size: 1/2 cup
- Calories: 32 (with sweetener)
- Fruit exchange: 0.5
- Protein: 0.4 g
- Fat: 0.1 g
- Carbohydrate: 7.9 g
- Sodium: 0.4 mg
- Potassium: 105.8 mg
Source: American Diabetes Association Family Cookbook, Vol. 1 (c. 1987)
